# GEN — Auto Content Engine API (Full Reference)

> GEN is an Autonomous Social Media Agent. It detects trends, generates video content, publishes across platforms, and improves automatically — every single day.

## Overview

GEN is structured as: Workspace → Agent → Auto Content Engine → Content Loop

- **Workspace**: Top-level container for a company or brand
- **Agent**: A brand identity with voice, personality, and strategy
- **Auto Content Engine**: Self-running content system with sheet (rows/columns/cells), video layers, automations, and global variables
- **Content Loop**: Spot → Generate → Deploy → Measure → Adapt → Repeat

## Authentication

Base URL: https://api.gen.pro/v1
Auth: `X-API-Key: <your-api-key>` header

Create an API key: POST /v1/persisted_tokens
The plain-text key is returned once in the `token` field. Store it securely.

All /v1/autocontentengine/ endpoints require:
- `agent_id` query parameter
- Active GEN credit balance

## OpenAPI Spec

Full OpenAPI 3.1 specification: https://api.gen.pro/openapi.yaml

## Discovery

GET /v1/me
→ {id, email, name, username, created_at}

GET /v1/workspaces
→ [{id, name}]

GET /v1/agents?workspace_id={id}
→ [{id, name}]

## API Keys

POST /v1/persisted_tokens
Body: {name?, expires_in?}
→ {id, name, token_type, status, token} (token shown once)

GET /v1/persisted_tokens
→ [{id, name, token_type, created_at, expires_at, last_used_at, revoked_at, status}]

PATCH /v1/persisted_tokens/{id}
Body: {persisted_token: {name}}

DELETE /v1/persisted_tokens/{id}/revoke

DELETE /v1/persisted_tokens/revoke_all

## Templates

Templates are pre-configured engines synced from a curated library. Cloning a template is the fastest way to create a production-ready engine with the right columns.

GET /v1/templates/projects?page={page}
→ [{id, slug, title, name, description, cover, tutorial_url, tags: [], recent_generated_contents: [{id, type, thumbnail_url}]}]
20 per page.

GET /v1/templates/projects/{slug}
slug can be a URL slug, UUID, or numeric ID.
→ {id, slug, title, name, description, cover, tutorial_url, tags: [], ...}

POST /v1/templates/spreadsheets/{slug}/clone
Body: {agent_id}
Clones the template into the specified agent's workspace. Returns the new engine.
→ Full engine object with columns, rows, cells

## Auto Content Engine

POST /v1/autocontentengine?agent_id={id}
Body: {spreadsheet: {title, is_default?}}
→ Full engine object with columns, rows, cells

GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}?agent_id={id}&with_execution_cost=true
→ Full engine with nested data

POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/clone?agent_id={id}
Body: {target_agent_id?}

## Rows

GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows?agent_id={id}
POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows?agent_id={id}
Body: {spreadsheet_row: {position?}}

GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows/{row_id}?agent_id={id}
POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows/{row_id}/duplicate?agent_id={id}
PUT /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows/update_positions?agent_id={id}
Body: {rows: [{id, position}]}

PUT /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows/mass_update?agent_id={id}

## Columns

GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns?agent_id={id}
POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns?agent_id={id}
Body: {spreadsheet_column: {title, type, position?}}

POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns/{col_id}/duplicate?agent_id={id}
PATCH /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns/update_positions?agent_id={id}
PUT /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns/mass_update?agent_id={id}

## Column Types & Roles

Types: text, image, video, audio

Roles:
- ingredient — User-editable input columns (ONLY these can be created/updated/deleted by users)
- video — Generated video layer column (system)
- final_video — Final composite video column (system)
- stats — Statistics/metadata column (system)
- global_variable_name — Variable name (system)
- global_variable_value — Variable value (system)

Default template columns: TEXT 1 (text/ingredient), TEXT 2 (text/ingredient), PROMPT (text/ingredient), VIDEO (video/video), FINAL VIDEO (video/final_video), STATS (stats/stats)

## Cells

GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}?agent_id={id}
PATCH /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}?agent_id={id}
Body: {spreadsheet_cell: {value}}

PUT /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/mass_update?agent_id={id}
PATCH /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/set_default_user_job?agent_id={id}
Body: {user_job_id}

## Layers

POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/layers?agent_id={id}
Body: {video_layer: {name, type, position?}}

GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/layers/{layer_id}?agent_id={id}
PATCH /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/layers/{layer_id}?agent_id={id}
DELETE /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/layers/{layer_id}?agent_id={id}
POST .../layers/{layer_id}/duplicate?agent_id={id}
PUT .../layers/update_positions?agent_id={id}

## Global Variables

GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/global_variables?agent_id={id}
→ Key-value pairs used for template substitution in prompts and content

POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/import_global_variables?agent_id={id}
(multipart/form-data with XLSX file)

GET /v1/autocontentengine/global_variables_template
→ XLSX template download

## Generations

POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/generate?agent_id={id}
Body: {generation_type, data: {prompt, model, ...}}
→ {generation_id, status: "pending"}

POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/layers/{layer_id}/generate?agent_id={id}
Body: {generation_type, data: {...}}
→ {generation_id, status: "pending"}

GET /v1/generations/{id}
→ {id, status, user_job_type, result, output_resources: [{id, url, thumbnail_url, object_type}]}

POST /v1/generations/{id}/stop → credits refunded
POST /v1/generations/{id}/continue → credits re-charged

## Creation Card Types

Each cell in a content engine has a creation card type that determines what kind of content it generates.

### Text
generation_type: "text"
Models: gemini_2_0_flash, gemini_2_5_pro, gpt_4o, gpt_4o_mini, o3_mini, o4_mini, claude_sonnet_4
data: {prompt, model, variables: {key: value}}
Inputs: prompt text (supports AI generation with {{variable}} substitution), model selection
Output: text string in cell value

### Image from Text
generation_type: "image_from_text"
Models: gemini_image, gemini_pro_image, midjourney
data: {prompt, model, aspect_ratio, variables: {key: value}}
Aspect ratios: 1:1, 9:16, 16:9, 4:3, 3:4
Inputs: prompt (AI text + variable substitution), aspect ratio
Output: image content resource

### Video from Text
generation_type: "video_from_text"
Models: veo_3, veo_3_fast, veo_3_1, veo_3_1_fast, sora_2, kling_1_6, seedance_pro, seedance_pro_1_5
data: {prompt, negative_prompt?, model, aspect_ratio, duration, variables: {key: value}}
Aspect ratios: 1:1, 9:16, 16:9
Durations: 5s, 10s (model-dependent)
Inputs: prompt, optional negative prompt, ratio, duration, variables
Output: video content resource

### Video from Image
generation_type: "video_from_image"
Models: kling_2_1, kling_2_6, veo_3, veo_3_fast, veo_3_1, veo_3_1_fast, sora_2, seedance_lite, seedance_pro, seedance_pro_1_5
data: {prompt, negative_prompt?, model, image_resource_id, image_tail_resource_id?, aspect_ratio, duration}
Aspect ratios: 1:1, 9:16, 16:9
Durations: 5s, 10s (model-dependent)
Inputs: source image (content resource ID), optional tail image, prompt, negative prompt, ratio, duration
Output: video content resource

### Video from Ingredients
generation_type: "video_from_ingredients"
Models: pika, kling_1_6, seedance_lite, veo_3_1, veo_3_1_fast
data: {prompt, model, asset_resource_ids: [], aspect_ratio, duration}
Aspect ratios: 1:1, 9:16, 16:9
Durations: 5s, 10s (model-dependent)
Inputs: prompt with asset selector (multiple content resource IDs), ratio, duration
Output: video content resource

### Speech from Text
generation_type: "speech_from_text"
Voice methods: my_voices (saved voices), design_voice (create from parameters), clone_voice (clone from audio)
data: {script, voice_method, voice_id?, language?, gender?, enhance_voice?, speed?}
For my_voices: {script, voice_method: "my_voices", voice_id}
For design_voice: {script, voice_method: "design_voice", language, gender, enhance_voice: true/false}
For clone_voice: {script, voice_method: "clone_voice", audio_resource_id}
Inputs: voice selection, script text, enhancement toggle, language, gender
Output: audio content resource

### Lipsync
generation_type: "lipsync"
Models: sync_so, gen
data: {model, video_resource_id, audio_resource_id}
Inputs: source video (content resource ID), source audio (content resource ID), lipsync model
Output: video content resource with synced lip movements

### Captions
generation_type: "captions"
Models: gemini
data: {model, source_resource_id}
Inputs: audio or video content resource ID
Output: caption/subtitle data

### Media
generation_type: "media"
Upload: image or video file directly to a cell
data: {content_resource_id}
Inputs: content resource ID from a prior upload
Output: media attached to cell

### Render Final Video
generation_type: "render"
POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/render?agent_id={id}
Composites all layers (video, audio, captions, lipsync) into a final video.
Output: final video content resource in the final_video column cell

## Automation

GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config
PATCH /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config
Body: {automation_config: {webhook_url?, callback_url?, polling_enabled?}}

POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config/test_webhook
POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config/test_callback

## Agents

POST /v1/agents
Body: {organization_id?, agent: {name, description?, time_zone?, eleven_lab_api_key?, hume_ai_api_key?, agent_avatars_attributes?}}
→ {agent: {id, name, description, organization_id, time_zone, primary_avatar_id, primary_avatar_url, role, default_user_voice}}
Errors: 422 agent_creation_failed, 422 organization_not_found, 422 invalid_api_key

GET /v1/agents/{id}?with_organization_uuid=true
→ {id, name, description, organization_id, time_zone, primary_avatar_id, primary_avatar_url, agent_setup_project_id, role, default_user_voice: {id, name, gender, language, provider, url}}
Errors: 403 permission_denied, 422 agent_not_found

PATCH /v1/agents/{id}
Body: {agent: {name?, description?, time_zone?, eleven_lab_api_key?, hume_ai_api_key?, agent_avatars_attributes?, default_user_voice_attributes?: {source, voice_id}}}
→ {agent: {id, name, description, organization_id, time_zone, primary_avatar_id, primary_avatar_url, role, default_user_voice}}
Errors: 403 permission_denied, 404 user_voice_resource_not_found, 422 agent_not_found, 422 validation_error, 422 invalid_api_key, 422 voice_id_required

DELETE /v1/agents/{id}
→ 200 (empty body)
Errors: 403 forbidden

GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/avatars?cursor={cursor}
→ [{id, is_primary, url, thumbnail_url, degod_avatar_id}]
Cursor-based pagination (20 per page). Primary avatar listed first.

POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/avatars
Body (multipart): agent_avatars_attributes[]: {file (JPEG/PNG/WebP) or degod_avatar_id}
→ 200 (empty body)
Errors: 422 avatar_creation_failed

PATCH /v1/agents/{agent_id}/avatars/{id}
Sets avatar as primary. All other avatars marked non-primary.
→ 200 (empty body)
Errors: 422 avatar_update_failed

DELETE /v1/agents/{agent_id}/avatars/{id}
id can be multiple IDs separated by underscores (e.g. 7_8_9).
→ 200 (empty body)

## Agent Profile

Unified view of agent identity + voice config + TrendPulse brand config in one endpoint.

GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/profile
→ {identity: {name, description, avatar_url, use_character, persona}, voice: {eleven_lab_api_key, hume_ai_api_key, default_voice: {id, name, provider}}, brand: {brand_name, description, goal, keywords: [], target_platforms: [], shortform, longform, linked_accounts: [{id, url, platform}], onboarding_status}}
brand section is null if no TrendPulse config exists.
Errors: 403 permission_denied, 422 agent_not_found

POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/profile
Body: {identity?: {name?, description?, use_character?, persona?}, voice?: {eleven_lab_api_key?, hume_ai_api_key?}, brand?: {brand_name?, description?, goal?, keywords?: [], target_platforms?: [], shortform?, longform?}}
Creates profile (first-time setup). Creates TrendPulse config if needed. Updates agent identity in Rails.
→ Full profile object
Errors: 422 agent_not_found, 422 validation_error

PUT /v1/agents/{agent_id}/profile
Body: Same as POST — send only sections/fields to change. Merges with existing data.
Array fields (keywords, target_platforms, linked_accounts) are replaced entirely, not appended.
→ Full profile object
Errors: 422 agent_not_found, 422 validation_error, 422 invalid_api_key

DELETE /v1/agents/{agent_id}/profile
Resets TrendPulse brand config only. Agent identity and voice settings preserved.
→ 200 (empty body)
Errors: 422 agent_not_found

## Organizations

GET /v1/organizations
→ [{id, uuid, organization_id, name, avatar: {url, thumbnail_url}, user_role, credit, available_credit: {generic, aura}, total_members, credit_plan: {id, name, cycle}}]

POST /v1/organizations
Body: {organization: {name, avatar? (file)}}
→ {organization_id}
Errors: 422 validation_error

GET /v1/organizations/{organization_id}
→ {id, uuid, organization_id, name, avatar, user_role, credit, available_credit, total_members, credit_plan}
Errors: 422 organization_not_found

PATCH /v1/organizations/{organization_id}
Body: {organization: {name?, avatar? (file)}}
→ {organization_id}
Errors: 403 forbidden (not owner/manager), 422 organization_not_found, 422 validation_error

DELETE /v1/organizations/{organization_id}
Permanently deletes organization and all associated data. Requires owner role. Irreversible.
→ 200 (empty body)
Errors: 403 forbidden (not owner), 422 organization_not_found

## Content Resources & Assets

GET /v1/content_resources?agent_id={id}&type={image|video|audio|zip|safe_tensors}&project_id={id}&ids[]={id}&page={page}
→ [{id, url, thumbnail_url, file_name, content_type}]
20 items per page (page starts at 0).

POST /v1/content_resources?agent_id={id}
Body (multipart): content_resource[file] (required), project_node[project_id]?, asset_folder[id]?
→ {content_resource: {id, url, thumbnail_url, file_name, content_type}, project_node: {id}, generator: null}
Errors: 403 forbidden, 422 content_resource_creation_failed

GET /v1/content_resources/{id}?agent_id={id}
→ {content_resource: {id, url, thumbnail_url, file_name, content_type}, project_node: {id}, generator: {id, status, type} | null}
generator is null for manual uploads, contains job info for AI-generated resources.
Errors: 404 content_resource_not_found

PATCH /v1/content_resources/{id}?agent_id={id}
Body: {content_resource: {filename}}
→ 200 (empty body)
Errors: 403 forbidden, 404 not_found, 422 validation_error

DELETE /v1/content_resources/{id}?agent_id={id}
→ 200 (empty body)
Errors: 403 forbidden, 404 not_found, 422 validation_error

GET /v1/asset_libraries?agent_id={id}&folder_id={id}&asset_type={image,video,audio,folder}&search={query}&order={recent}&page={page}&page_size={size}
Unified view of files and folders. Polymorphic response — items have "type": "AssetFolder" or "ContentResource".
→ [{id, type: "AssetFolder", name} | {id, type: "ContentResource", url, thumbnail_url, file_name, content_type}]

## Asset Folders

POST /v1/asset_folders?agent_id={id}
Body: {asset_folder: {name, parent_id?}}
→ {asset_folder_id}
Errors: 403 forbidden, 422 validation_error

PATCH /v1/asset_folders/{id}?agent_id={id}
Body: {asset_folder: {name}}
→ {asset_folder_id}
Errors: 403 forbidden, 404 not_found, 422 validation_error

DELETE /v1/asset_folders/{id}?agent_id={id}
Deletes folder and all contents (subfolders and files).
→ 200 (empty body)
Errors: 403 forbidden, 404 not_found, 422 folder_removal_failed

## Direct Upload

POST /v1/direct_upload
Get a pre-signed S3 URL for large file uploads. Workflow: (1) call this, (2) PUT file to returned URL with headers, (3) use signed_id as content_resource[file].
Body: {blob: {filename, byte_size (max 1GB), checksum (base64 MD5), content_type, metadata?}}
→ {id, key, filename, content_type, byte_size, checksum, signed_id, direct_upload: {url, headers: {Content-Type, Content-MD5}}}
Compute checksum: openssl md5 -binary file | base64
Errors: 422 invalid_content_type, 422 file_size_exceeded, 422 direct_upload_failed

## Error Format

{error: "Human-readable message", error_code: "machine_code"}

Common codes:
- 401 unauthorized — invalid API key
- 403 forbidden — insufficient permissions for this resource
- 404 not_found — resource doesn't exist
- 422 usable_gen_credit_required — no active credits
- 422 agent_not_found — invalid agent_id
- 422 insufficient_credits_for_job — not enough credits
- 422 validation_error — invalid request body or parameters

## Common Workflows

### Create a TikTok Video (End to End)
1. GET /v1/templates/projects → pick a video template
2. POST /v1/templates/spreadsheets/{slug}/clone → {agent_id} → get engine
3. GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}?agent_id={id} → see columns and cells
4. PATCH /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{text_cell_id}?agent_id={id} → set script
5. POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{video_cell_id}/generate?agent_id={id} → generate video
6. GET /v1/generations/{gen_id} → poll until completed
7. POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{audio_cell_id}/generate → generate speech
8. POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{lipsync_cell_id}/generate → lipsync
9. POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{final_cell_id}/render → render final video

### Generate Batch Images
1. POST /v1/autocontentengine?agent_id={id} → create engine
2. POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns?agent_id={id} → add image column
3. POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows?agent_id={id} → add rows
4. POST .../cells/{cell_id}/generate → generate in each cell
5. GET /v1/generations/{id} → poll each generation

### Upload and Use a Large Asset
1. POST /v1/direct_upload → get pre-signed S3 URL
2. PUT file to the returned URL with Content-Type and Content-MD5 headers
3. POST /v1/content_resources?agent_id={id} with signed_id as content_resource[file]
4. Use the returned content_resource.id in generation data (e.g., image_resource_id, audio_resource_id)

### Set Up Automation Webhook
1. PATCH /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config → set webhook_url and callback_url
2. POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config/test_webhook → verify delivery
3. POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config/test_callback → verify callback
4. Generations will now POST status updates to your webhook_url

## Integrations

MCP Server: npx @poweredbygen/autocontentengine-mcp-server@latest (env: GEN_API_KEY)
TypeScript SDK: npm install @poweredbygen/autocontentengine-sdk
n8n: HTTP Request node with X-API-Key header
OpenAPI Spec: https://api.gen.pro/openapi.yaml
Full Docs: https://api.gen.pro
